title: In /Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers/claude-config, verify test coverage/evidence for the Phase 0 handoff pipeline change. Compare against the 7-item test plan and acceptance criteria in ~/.claude/cache/handoff-phase0-codex.md and ~/.claude/cache/dev-spec-phase0-handoff-pipeline.md. Return missing test...
summary_text: **Missing execution paths (first)** 1. Kernel local launch does not fan out to GLM/Gemini/Cursor/Copilot/Grok; it writes receipt/ledger then `exec`s a single Codex thread via `kernel-codex-thread.sh launch` ([scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh:492](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh:492), [scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh:545](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh:545), [scripts/lib/kernel-codex-thread.sh:110](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-codex-thread.sh:110), [scripts/lib/kernel-codex-thread.sh:127](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-codex-thread.sh:127)). 2. No call path from Kernel launch into specialist/GLM executors (`kernel-optional-lane-exec.sh`, `kernel-glm-exec.sh`); they exist as standalone/manual wrappers ([scripts/lib/kernel-optional-lane-exec.sh:51](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-optional-lane-exec.sh:51), [scripts/lib/kernel-optional-lane-exec.sh:158](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-optional-lane-exec.sh:158), [scripts/lib/kernel-glm-exec.sh:9](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-glm-exec.sh:9)). 3. Grok/xAI is not part of Kernel launch provider canonicalization or launch provider selection (only `codex/glm/gemini-cli/cursor-cli/copilot-cli`) ([scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh:104](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh:104), [scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh:425](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh:425)). **Concrete runtime evidence vs config/docs** 1. Cross-provider execution (including `xai/grok`) is implemented in CI harness, not Kernel launch path ([scripts/harness/ci-agent-runner.sh:310](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/ci-agent-runner.sh:310), [scripts/harness/ci-agent-runner.sh:395](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/ci-agent-runner.sh:395)). 2. Subscription harness supports `codex/claude/glm/gemini` and explicitly skips unsupported providers (so no xAI there) ([scripts/harness/subscription-agent-runner.sh:602](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/subscription-agent-runner.sh:602), [scripts/harness/subscription-agent-runner.sh:671](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/subscription-agent-runner.sh:671)). 3. Agent matrix includes optional Gemini/xAI lanes, but this is topology/config evidence, not Kernel local execution evidence ([scripts/lib/build-agent-matrix.sh:363](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/build-agent-matrix.sh:363), [scripts/lib/build-agent-matrix.sh:367](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/build-agent-matrix.sh:367)). 4. Many Kernel tests assert ledger/receipt state by directly recording provider success instead of proving live provider invocation in end-to-end Kernel launch ([tests/test-kernel-phase-gate.sh:51](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-phase-gate.sh:51), [tests/test-kernel-run-complete.sh:46](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-run-complete.sh:46), [tests/test-kernel-4pane-surface.sh:64](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-4pane-surface.sh:64)). Conclusion: Kernel does **not** currently execute true multi-agent orchestration across GLM-5.1, Gemini-3.1, Cursor-CLI, Copilot-CLI, and Grok-API in its local authority path; that expectation is currently a workflow violation unless execution is routed through the separate harness path.
